case_title: SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE INC. VS AROMI RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-26-1998, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-06-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AROMI RESTAURANT $1,468.08 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,518.08, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO AMEND CLAIM TO $1468.08 IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT. SENT TO COURT FORNAT JUDGE SIGNATURE. CONTINUANCE FEE PAID.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $861.49 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO GUIDE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AROMI RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AROMI RESTAURANT
